scope: Browser traversal of login forgot-password link, reset request degraded/no-mail state, confirm route token prefill, and route-level reset contract

behavior: Browser test traverses /login -> forgot password link -> /password-reset.
Submitting admin@kiss-pm.local observes POST /api/auth/password-reset/request returning 202 with delivery none and an explicit no-mail UI state.
Browser DOM does not expose devToken or a 64-hex reset token in the no-mail runtime path.
Confirm route /password-reset/confirm loads, token query parameter pre-fills the token input, and the footer link returns to reset request.
Existing route-level tests still cover SMTP-like resetUrl, confirm, login with new password, and concurrent token consume.
